historical_erp.rationale: Long-run realized equity premium added to current Rf.

regime_adjusted.rationale: Regime 'late-cycle' applies -2.00% adjustment to historical ERP.

bl_equilibrium.rationale: Black-Litterman equilibrium return implied by market-cap weights.

inverse_gordon.rationale: Grinold-Kroner: dividend yield + earnings growth + valuation change.

implied_erp.rationale: CAPE 13.0 earnings yield 7.69% implied forward return.

survey_analyst.rationale: Consensus survey of analysts / macro view.

auto_blend.rationale: Confidence-weighted blend of all candidate methods.
